name: Belgian Cheese Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the cream cheese, confectioners' sugar, and lemon juice until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat until very smooth after the last egg is added.
4. Stir in the heavy cream and pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
5. Brush the top of the tart with beaten egg white and confectioners' sugar mixture.
6. Bake for 25 minutes or until set. Allow to cool to room temperature before chilling.
